scripts.wasm: wasm-pack build .. --release --target web --out-dir site/src/wasm --out-name langbench -- --no-default-features --features wasm
scripts.dev: npm run wasm && npm run data && vite
scripts.build: npm run wasm && npm run data && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.test: npm run wasm && npm run data && vitest run
